meaning: v.征募,谋取(支持、赞助等),应募,赞助,支持,征召,参军
examples: They hoped to enlist the help of the public in solving the crime.
If the bailiff thinks that things could turn nasty he will enlist the help of the police.
I had to cut down a tree and enlist the help of seven neighbours to get it out of the garden!
Shows enlist legions of wardrobe mistresses and stylists, all trained to communicate through clothes.
Any soldier below the rank of colonel would be eligible to enlist in a new army.
